functional_requirements.requirement: The system allows applicants to apply for a visa from anywhere and at any time.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The overall aim of the system is that the applicant can apply for the visa from anywhere and at any time.

functional_requirements.requirement: Applicants can register by providing a valid email and password.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The applicant should register by providing a valid email and a password.

functional_requirements.requirement: The system checks the correctness of applicant credentials before allowing login.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The credentials are checked for correctness and the applicant to allow to log in.

functional_requirements.requirement: Once logged in, applicants can view the application form with necessary details and attach required documents.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the applicant logs in, he/she will be shown the application form which asks the applicant to provide the necessary details and asks him/her to attach the necessary documents.

functional_requirements.requirement: The system provides a list of available visa types for applicants to choose from.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: It also provides a list of visas to choose from.

functional_requirements.requirement: Applicants can view details of fees and requirements for each country's visa application.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: He/she can also view the details of fair to visa for each country.

functional_requirements.requirement: Applicants can modify or delete their applied details.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The applicant can view, modify and delete the details applied.

functional_requirements.requirement: Administrators can view details of applicants' required visas.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The system will have a provision for the administrator to view the details of what types of visas are required by the applicant.

functional_requirements.requirement: Administrators can update or delete applicants' details.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The administrator will also be able to update and delete the details of the applicants.

functional_requirements.requirement: Administrators have a facility to interact with the Visa Consultant Officer.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The administrator will have a facility to interact with the Visa Consultant Officer.

functional_requirements.requirement: Visa Consultant Officers can view and check document proofs submitted by applicants.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The Visa Consultant Officer can be able to view and check the document proofs (valid passport, Demand Draft Visa Fee I-20 form, letter of admission, aid letter, etc.) submitted by the applicant

functional_requirements.requirement: Visa Consultant Officers have authority to accept or reject visa applications.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: He/She has the authority to accept/reject the visa application applied by the applicant (Figures 30.1–30.9).

prompt:
You are a requirements engineer.
Extract functional software requirements from the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "functional_requirements": [
    {
      "requirement": "string",
      "evidence_quote": "short exact quote from source text"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
1. Include only system capabilities/behaviors.
2. Exclude background context, impact statements, problem motivation, and pure business goals.
3. Keep each requirement atomic and clear.
4. Preserve original meaning. Do not invent functionality.
5. If uncertain, keep the item but keep evidence_quote explicit.

Source text:
<<<
A visa is a document issued by a country giving a certain individual permission to enter a country
for a given period of time for certain purposes. It is received after several verifications through
offline mode. It requires the applicant to go to the Passport Verification Centre for the verification
of documents. Sometimes even the cost of getting the visa will be high as there may be middlemen
involved in it. It takes anywhere from two weeks to two months to receive the visa if applied in
offline mode. With the use of an online visa processing system, the middlemen entry in getting
the visa gets reduced and the process of application of visa becomes easier. The overall aim of the
system is that the applicant can apply for the visa from anywhere and at any time. The applicant
can apply for the visa and submit it online. It provides more flexibility to the applicant compared
to the existing system. There are certain types of visas that the applicant can apply for such as
employment visa, study visa, resident visa, H1 visa, business visa, etc. People who apply for the visa
for work, education, etc will be benefitted a lot from this system. The applicant should register by
providing a valid email and a password. The applicant has to log in to apply for the visa. The credentials are checked for correctness and the applicant to allow to log in. Once the applicant logs in,
he/she will be shown the application form which asks the applicant to provide the necessary details
and asks him/her to attach the necessary documents. It also provides a list of visas to choose from.
He/she can also view the details of fair to visa for each country. The applicant can view, modify
and delete the details applied. The system will have a provision for the administrator to view the
details of what types of visas are required by the applicant. The administrator will also be able to
update and delete the details of the applicants. The administrator will have a facility to interact
with the Visa Consultant Officer. The Visa Consultant Officer can be able to view and check the
document proofs (valid passport, Demand Draft Visa Fee I-20 form, letter of admission, aid letter,
etc.) submitted by the applicant and can be able to view the purpose of application of visa. He/She
has the authority to accept/reject the visa application applied by the applicant (Figures 30.1–30.9).
>>>
